'''badasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachface|beachface]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachface|beachface]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| badasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædæshæth|bædæshæth]] || [[word:bædæshæj|bædæshæj]] || [[word:bædæshæsh|bædæshæsh]] || [[word:bædæshæ|bædæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:badadashath|badadashath]] || [[word:badadashaj|badadashaj]] || [[word:badadashash|badadashash]] || [[word:badadasha|badadasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:badashath|badashath]] || [[word:badashaj|badashaj]] || [[word:badashash|badashash]] || [[word:badasha|badasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:badafshath|badafshath]] || [[word:badafshaj|badafshaj]] || [[word:badafshash|badafshash]] || [[word:badafshaf|badafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badashatha|badashatha]] || [[word:badashaja|badashaja]] || [[word:badashasha|badashasha]] || [[word:badashaka|badashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badashath|badashath]] || [[word:badashaj|badashaj]] || [[word:badashash|badashash]] || [[word:badasha|badasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badashathal|badashathal]] || [[word:badashajal|badashajal]] || [[word:badashashal|badashashal]] || [[word:badashakal|badashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badashathatha|badashathatha]] || [[word:badashajaja|badashajaja]] || [[word:badashashasha|badashashasha]] || [[word:badashaka|badashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badashathan|badashathan]] || [[word:badashajan|badashajan]] || [[word:badashashan|badashashan]] || [[word:badashakan|badashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badashathaoro|badashathaoro]] || [[word:badashajaoro|badashajaoro]] || [[word:badashashaoro|badashashaoro]] || [[word:badashakaoro|badashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
